query: Yellowstone Rendezvous cross country ski race West Yellowstone

videos.title: Yellowstone Rendezvous 2010 SLNST
videos.description: Went to bed to stars with hope of a cold, hard snow race start, instead we woke to an overcast morning and warm temps so we scrambled to rewax for the West Yellowstone Rendezvous.  Highlights of the 50k, 25k, 10k, and 5k races with the Salt Lake Nordic Ski Team, March 6, 2010.  Much was learned by the younger skiers about racing longer distances.

videos.title: Women's 5k Classic West Yellowstone 2011
videos.description: Jesse Diggins leads the Women's SuperTour 5k classic race at West Yellowstone, 2011.

videos.title: 2009 Yellowstone Rendezvous
videos.description: Miscellaneous clips from the 2009 Yellowstone Rendezvous cross country ski race in West Yellowstone, Montana.

videos.title: *Ernie's U14 5km West Yellowstone 2013
videos.description: Final race of the West Yellowstone Ski Festival has the U14 skiers racing the same 5km course as the Super Tour skiers. Watch the hairpin turns and hill climbing by the TUNA and Park City Junior's.

videos.title: West Yellowstone Ski Festival, Rendezvous Trails 2014
videos.description: The West Yellowstone Ski Festival at the Rendezvous Trails draws skiers from across the country and world for the first skiing of the year. The SuperTour races are over and the TUNA skiers of all ages play games, drop the Telemark Hill, ski the trails, and venture into the Park. Sorry to see it end.
